distributionPolicy.notes: Desktop code remains a local CM/SSH session prototype. Public downloadable installer artifacts are not part of the active Kuviewer product path.

connectionModes.description: Future desktop-local prototype direction: manage multiple desktop-only sessions to CM or bastion servers over an SSH-style connection model.
Prototype compatibility path only; not the primary desktop product direction.
Historical packaging/runtime scaffold for evaluation only; not the primary desktop product direction.
Credential-store prototype path superseded by the CM/SSH session manager direction for product work.

buildPrerequisites.purpose: Run the existing Vite frontend build before Tauri bundles the app.
Install website and desktop package dependencies.
Build the bundled Kuviewer Go API sidecar before Tauri packaging.
Run the Rust build and package commands used by Tauri.
